pageContext.name: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring Movie Poster 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: The Quest for The Ring Awaits You! First THE LORD OF THE RINGS™ Poster Coin.  We are thrilled to reveal the first poster coin for THE LORD OF THE RINGS™! Of course, we start with the first film in the epic fantasy trilogy, The Fellowship of the Ring.   This treasure from Middle Earth is made from 1oz of pure silver and is crafted to replicate the film's poster. It showcases a frosted image of the Pillars of Kings, which creates a stunning contrast against the colored landscape. Detailed engravings and a mirror finish surrounding the image adds extra charm to this beautiful design. The obverse is lightly frosted and includes the Ian Rank Broadley effigy of Queen Elizabeth II, confirming the coin as legal tender.   Created in partnership with Warner Bros. Consumer Products, the coin is secured in an acrylic capsule, nestled in blue velvet, and arrives in a custom-designed box with a large window for display. Printed on the box, you will find a Certificate of Authenticity and the unique number for the coin in the limited mintage of just 3,000.   This piece is sure to drive excitement for all LOTR fans, so don't delay. Order now!
